## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members Dig and Mariana (Nana) to GrowthX's company operations and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is organized into two main orgs: "build" (non-client-facing) and "deliver" (client-facing)](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Onboarding process includes setting up accounts, reviewing handbook materials, and watching key videos](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [New hires should balance following existing processes with bringing their own experience and ideas](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Feedback on the onboarding process is encouraged to improve it for future new team members](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Organization

  - [Two main orgs: "build" (B/) and "deliver" (D/)](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Build org: ops, engineering, sales, growth (non-client-facing)](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Deliver org: client-facing, producing materials and outcomes for customers](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Slack channels organized with B/ and D/ prefixes to reflect this structure](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Onboarding Process and Resources

  - [Notion handbook: central resource for company information](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Linear project for company-wide onboarding: tracks progress through tasks](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Key materials to review:](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Company documents and videos](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [2-hour workshop by Marcel explaining GrowthX's business model and value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Onboarding checklist:](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Day 1: Account setup and initial meetings](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [Week 1: Review documents, watch videos, attend scheduled sessions](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Tools and Communication

  - [Notion for company handbook and information](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Linear for project management and task tracking](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Slack for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [Specific onboarding channels: D-onboarding and B-onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Witt is the go-to person for tool access issues](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Team Dynamics and Expectations

  - [Balance between following existing processes and bringing new ideas](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Encouraged to ask questions in appropriate Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Alice and Woods (experienced EAs) available for guidance on team norms](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Company is rapidly changing, open to new approaches from experienced hires](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nana: Complete day 1 setup tasks and schedule intro call with Matthew](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Dig: Continue working through onboarding materials and LinkedIn project with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Both: Watch Marcel's workshop video on GrowthX's business model](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Provide feedback on onboarding process to Bridget for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Utilize appropriate channels (Slack, Witt, Bridget) for different types of questions or issues](https://fathom.video/share/QVhHwqw1AZ-wf8Luz-YQw8G6aGERKMBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
